productDisplayName: Vans unisex Classic Slip-On Black Casual Shoes
description: A great slip-on shoe from vans, so comfortable, practical and durable you'll want to wear it every day. Built by skateboarders, for skateboarders, but loved by all for the perfect blend of classic cool and modern slick style. If you don't yet own a pair then this is a good place to start, and if you're already a Vans fan there's always room for one more great shoe in your closet. Upper Printed fabric uppers for durability and comfort Check print for added style Padded collar and textile lining for extra comfort Elasticated sides on the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feet Brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
